title: Kumasi Tech Summit 2026
description: The largest technology and innovation conference in the Ashanti Region. Network with 500+ industry leaders, attend workshops, and discover startup opportunities.

title: Ashanti Cultural Festival
description: Celebrate our rich heritage with traditional dances, food, fashion shows and live performances from Ghana's top artists.

title: Ghana Startup Bootcamp
description: 3-day intensive program for young entrepreneurs. Pitch to investors and win up to GH¢50,000 in funding.

title: Youth Leadership Summit
description: Empowering the next generation of Ghanaian leaders with keynote speeches, panel discussions and mentorship sessions.
